Comment: Validates refresh configuration: structure (required fields) + resources (exist and accessible). Supports cross-region validation via Lambda proxy (Database.Source.ProxyLambdaArn, EFS.Replication.ProxyLambdaArn). Always succeeds with a validation report.

ValidateAll.Comment: Run all validation checks in parallel across 5 categories

Branches.Comment: Branch 0: Config Structure - Validate all required fields are present

CheckAccountFields.Comment: Verify SourceAccount, DestinationAccount, and K8sProxyLambdaArn fields

CheckDatabaseEnabled.Comment: Skip DB field validation if Database.Enabled is false

CheckDatabaseInstanceItems.Comment: Verify each item in Database.Target.Instances has DbInstanceClass and Engine

CheckDatabaseNetworkFields.Comment: Verify Database.Network and Parameters fields (KmsKeyId is optional for unencrypted clusters)

CheckDatabaseAlwaysRequired.Comment: Verify fields always consumed by orchestrator (EnableMasterSecret, ConfigureS3Integration, CreateDBInstance)

CheckMysqlOpsConditional.Comment: If MySQLDump or MySQLImport enabled, check MySQLOperations fields

CheckMysqlOpsFields.Comment: Verify MySQLOperations fields when dump/import enabled

CheckEKSDumpFields.Comment: Dump/import runs on EKS - NodeSelector, Tolerations and Scaling are required

CheckMysqlImportConditional.Comment: If MySQLImport enabled, check import-specific fields

CheckSqlScriptsConditional.Comment: If RunSqlScripts enabled, check SqlScripts fields

CheckSecretsSyncConditional.Comment: Check for new Secrets.Sync format or legacy RotateSecrets

CheckSecretsSyncFields.Comment: Verify Secrets.Sync.Items is present with at least the array field

CheckSFNDatabaseConditionalArns.Comment: Check conditional SFN ARNs: dump if RunMysqlDumpOldCluster, import if RunMysqlImportCluster

CheckSFNDatabaseConditionalArns2.Comment: Check conditional SFN ARNs: sql scripts and rotate secrets

CheckSFNEFSConditional.Comment: If EFS enabled, check EFS config and SFN ARNs

CheckEFSFields.Comment: Verify EFS config fields (Name always required for PrepareRefresh tag extraction)

CheckEFSFields2.Comment: Verify EFS replication fields (only for cross-account, skip for backup restore)

Choices.Comment: Backup restore mode: no Replication section, check Backup fields instead

CheckEFSContextFields.Comment: Verify EFS.Context and EFS.LambdaConfig (SourceEfsSubPath optional for backup restore)

CheckEFSFlagFileConditional.Comment: If EnableFlagFileCheck is true, verify Lambda prefix fields and SSM sync requirement

CheckEFSFlagFileFields.Comment: Verify Lambda prefix fields and SyncConfigItems ARN (needed to sync SSM subpath before flag check)

CheckEFSDestinationMode.Comment: If CreateDestinationEFS is false, validate DestinationFileSystemId; otherwise validate create fields

CheckEFSExistingDestFields.Comment: When using existing EFS, DestinationFileSystemId is required

CheckEFSNewDestFields.Comment: When creating new EFS, KMS key and tags are required (Name already checked in CheckEFSFields)

CheckEFSSSMConditional.Comment: If StoreInSSM enabled, verify SSMParameters fields

CheckEFSSSMFields.Comment: Verify EFS SSMParameters fields when StoreInSSM enabled

CheckEFSLambdaCodeFields.Comment: Verify LambdaConfig fields needed for dynamic Lambda creation (get-efs-subpath)

CheckSFNEKSConditional.Comment: If EKS.Options.ScaleServices enabled, check services config and SFN ARNs

CheckEKSScaleServicesFields.Comment: Verify EKS fields required for ScaleServices (ClusterName, Namespace, Services, SFN ARNs)

CheckEKSManageStorageConditional.Comment: If EKS.Options.ManageStorage enabled, check storage config and SFN ARN

CheckEKSManageStorageFields.Comment: Verify EKS fields required for ManageStorage (ClusterName, Namespace, SFN ARN)

CheckEKSArchiveJobConditional.Comment: If RunArchiveJob enabled, check SFN ARN

CheckEKSScalingConditional.Comment: If dump or import enabled, check EKS scaling fields and ScaleNodegroupAsg ARN

CheckEKSScalingFields.Comment: Verify EKS scaling fields when dump/import uses ScaleNodegroupAsg

CheckNotifyConditional.Comment: If Notifications enabled, verify DynamoDB and SNS fields

CheckConfigSyncConditional.Comment: If ConfigSync enabled, verify Items array and SFN ARN

CheckConfigSyncFields.Comment: Verify ConfigSync.Items exists and SFN ARN is present

Branches.Comment: Branch 1: IAM - Validate cross-account role assumption

CheckSourceRole.Comment: Verify we can assume the source account role

CheckDestRole.Comment: Verify we can assume the destination account role

Branches.Comment: Branch 2: Database - Validate source cluster, destination network, parameters and KMS

CheckDBEnabled_V.Comment: Skip DB validation if Database.Enabled is false

CheckProxyForSourceCluster.Comment: Route to Lambda proxy if source DB is in a different region than the SFN

CheckSourceClusterViaProxy.Comment: Verify source DB cluster exists via Lambda proxy (cross-region)

CheckSourceCluster.Comment: Verify source DB cluster exists and is available

CheckDestSubnetGroup.Comment: Verify destination DB subnet group exists

CheckDestClusterPG.Comment: Verify destination cluster parameter group exists

CheckDestInstancePG.Comment: Verify destination instance parameter group exists

CheckKmsKeyPresent.Comment: Skip KMS check if Database.Secrets.KmsKeyId is not set (unencrypted clusters)

CheckDestKmsAuroraKey.Comment: Verify destination KMS key for Aurora is accessible

Branches.Comment: Branch 3: EFS - Validate source filesystem and destination KMS (if EFS enabled)

CheckProxyForSourceEFS.Comment: Route to Lambda proxy if source EFS is in a different region than the SFN

CheckSourceEFSViaProxy.Comment: Verify source EFS filesystem exists via Lambda proxy (cross-region)

CheckSourceEFS.Comment: Verify source EFS filesystem exists (uses EFS source account credentials for cross-account)

CheckProxyForExistingReplication.Comment: Route to Lambda proxy for checking existing replication if cross-region

CheckExistingReplicationViaProxy.Comment: Detect existing replication on source EFS via Lambda proxy (cross-region). SUCCESS = replication exists (bad). ReplicationNotFound error = no replication (good).

Catch.Comment: No replication found via proxy - this is the expected (happy) path. Lambda may wrap the error.

CheckExistingReplication.Comment: Detect existing replication on source EFS. SUCCESS = replication exists (bad). ReplicationNotFoundException = no replication (good).

Catch.Comment: No replication found - this is the expected (happy) path

ReplicationAlreadyExists.Comment: Existing replication is accepted - setup_cross_account_replication will reuse it if destination matches

Result.Note: Existing replication found - will be reused by setup step

CheckDestinationEFSMode.Comment: Route: CreateDestinationEFS=false → check existing EFS, Replication present → check replication KMS, else (backup restore) → skip to EFSPassed

CheckEfsKmsKeyPresent.Comment: Only check KMS if Replication.DestinationKmsKeyId exists (cross-account). For backup restore (mono-account), skip KMS check.

CheckDestinationEFS.Comment: Verify destination EFS filesystem exists when reusing an existing one (CreateDestinationEFS=false)

CheckDestKmsEfsKey.Comment: Verify destination KMS key for EFS is accessible (only when creating new EFS)

Branches.Comment: Branch 4: EKS - Validate destination cluster exists (if ScaleServices or ManageStorage enabled)

CheckEKSEnabled_V.Comment: Run EKS validation if ScaleServices or ManageStorage is true

CheckDestEKSCluster.Comment: Verify destination EKS cluster exists and is active

CheckAnyFailed.Comment: Check if any validation branch reported FAILED
